gap_reasons.detail: No committed row contains a complete independently recomputable metric, definition, member-set, baseline, and tier receipt.
The public index preserves short page observations but intentionally does not claim page-complete asset hashes.
Public visibility does not establish reuse, adaptation, model-training, or commercial production rights.
Several observations have only an age-mismatched, different-job, or same-series boundary rather than a published matched-control set.

limitations: The twelve observations remain research leads or task-fit boundaries; none is a ready style rule.
The starter aesthetic pack must remain absent or unchanged until the full 10-cell, 6-carrier, 4-job gate is independently verified.
